name: extend_video
description: Extend an existing video using Veo 3.1. Takes 5-20 minutes. Returns task_id (async). The new clip continues from where the original ended.

video_url.description: URL of the video to extend (e.g. /ui/uploads/video.mp4)

prompt.description: Optional prompt for how to extend the video

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress.
